Video.summary: Clouds and sea roll in toward land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Seascape Fantasy

Video.summary: A waterfall forms a cascading stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterfall Wonder

Video.summary: Bob paints a "dreamscape."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: That Time of Year

Video.summary: Two palms lean into rolling waves.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: High Tide

Video.summary: Bob harmonizes two oval landscapes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Oval Fantasy

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Southwest Serenity

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest on partially black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Enchanted Forest

Video.summary: Mist seeps through a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Woods

Video.summary: Watch and learn as Bob Ross unfolds this beautifully soft wooded scene with gently rippling brook, all inside an oval shape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wooded Stream Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints within a double oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Oval Stream

Video.summary: Sentry firs surround a peak and lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mighty Mountain Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Little Home in the Meadow

Video.summary: Bob uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Grey Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil beach scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rowboat on the Beach

Video.summary: Bob paints mountains and greenery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Glory

Video.summary: Bob paints a soft winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Lace

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rippling Waters

Video.summary: Bob paints a silent snowy scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowfall Magic

Video.summary: John Thamm paints a head and face.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Contemplative Lady

Video.summary: Bob paints an isolated forest river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Mist Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a calm mountain lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mirrored Images

Video.summary: A woodland scene lit by the waning rays of the sun.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Embers of Sunlight

Video.summary: Bob paints a moored fishing boat.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Dock Scene

Video.summary: Bob paints a thawing landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Not Quite Spring

Video.summary: Bob paints an autumnal valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pretty Autumn Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a country scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Barn in Snow Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a rugged mountain shelter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin in frigid mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Teton Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints flowering trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Trace of Spring

Video.summary: Visiting artist Ben Stahl uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Portrait of Sally

Video.summary: Bob paints tall, smooth falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Graceful Waterfall

Video.summary: Bob paints a barn in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Barn at Sunset

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross shows how to create a mirror-like lake spanning the width of snowy peaks and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake by Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Back-Country Path

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter landscape within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Icy Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Footbridge

Video.summary: Bob paints the desert in spring.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Hues

Video.summary: Bob paints an early spring scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hint of Springtime

Video.summary: Bob paints a nature scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evergreen at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints firs, peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Portrait of Winter

Video.summary: Bob helps a timid little stream find its way to a delightful waterfall, while gazing upon a forest of elegant trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Misty Waterfall
